title: Board and Batten Twin Bed
summary: A twin bed with plywood headboard and footboard panels dressed in vertical 1x2 board-and-batten trim, on 2x2 legs with side rails and slat support cleats.
description:
The headboard and footboard are both plywood panels first, framed top and bottom with 1x6 and 2x2 trim, then dressed with five evenly spaced 1x2 battens running vertically down the panel face — this batten pattern is the same board-and-batten treatment used elsewhere in this catalog, applied here to a bed rather than a console or dresser. Build both panels the same way, at their own heights, before attaching the legs.

The 2x2 legs attach to each panel — taller at the headboard, shorter at the footboard — and the 1x6 side rails run the full length of the bed between them, with 2x2 cleats fastened along the inside to support the slats. **Fourteen slats are a starting point, not a hard requirement** — the plan is explicit that more or fewer may be needed depending on spacing and mattress support requirements.

Check the headboard and footboard for square before final assembly, since the batten trim makes any twist in the panel obvious once it's standing.

materials.name: Primer and paint, or stain and poly

cutList.note: May need more or fewer depending on spacing.

steps.title: Build the headboard and footboard panels
steps.body: Frame both plywood panels with the bottom and top trim, then attach the vertical battens evenly spaced across each face.

steps.title: Attach the legs
steps.body: Attach the taller legs to the headboard and shorter legs to the footboard, checking for square.

steps.title: Add the side rails and cleats
steps.body: Connect the headboard and footboard with the side rails, then attach the slat cleats along the inside.

steps.title: Add the slats
steps.body: Lay the slats across the cleats, adjusting the count to your own spacing and mattress support needs.

steps.title: Finish
steps.body: Sand all surfaces and apply primer and paint, or stain and poly.
materials: Primer and paint, or stain and poly

unresolvedImages.alt: Board and batten twin bed with paneled headboard and footboard
